question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

graph.answer:
**Central Flow**
- The public entrypoint is in the README hello-world example: `AppFactory::create()` and `App::run()` are the intended surface area, not direct construction or manual dispatch ([README.md](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/README.md#L48), [README.md](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/README.md#L73)).
- `AppFactory::create()` builds the app and resolves a response factory via `determineResponseFactory()`; if you create from a container, `createFromContainer()` pulls the same core dependencies from the container when present ([Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php#L48), [Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php#L72), [Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php#L124)).
- `App::__construct()` wires the runtime: it creates a `RouteRunner`, then seeds a `MiddlewareDispatcher` with that runner as the tip of the stack unless you inject a custom dispatcher ([Slim/App.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L52), [Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php#L34), [Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php#L47)).
- `App::run()` creates a request from globals when none is passed, then calls `App::handle()`; `App::handle()` delegates into the middleware stack and strips the body for `HEAD` requests after dispatch ([Slim/App.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L177), [Slim/App.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L198)).
- `MiddlewareDispatcher::handle()` just forwards to the current tip, and its `add*()` methods build a last-in-first-out stack; `addRoutingMiddleware()` is the explicit way to insert routing before custom middleware if you need control over order ([Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php#L68), [Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php#L76), [Slim/App.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L118)).
- Routing happens in two places: `RoutingMiddleware::performRouting()` when routing is added to the stack explicitly, and `RouteRunner::handle()` as the fallback at the tip when user middleware did not route first ([Slim/Middleware/RoutingMiddleware.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Middleware/RoutingMiddleware.php#L48), [Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php#L47)).
- The routing handoff is request-attribute based: `RoutingMiddleware` writes `RouteContext` attributes, `RouteRunner` reads them back, then `Route::run()` hands off to the route’s own middleware dispatcher and `Route::handle()` resolves the callable and invocation strategy that actually executes the handler ([Slim/Routing/RouteContext.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteContext.php#L29), [Slim/Routing/Route.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Route.php#L312), [Slim/Routing/Route.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Route.php#L339)).
- If you touch URL normalization or route lookup, `RouteResolver::computeRoutingResults()` is the normalization point before FastRoute dispatch, and `resolveRoute()` is the lookup bridge from route id to `RouteInterface` ([Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php#L37), [Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php#L49)).

**Read Next**
- Factory wiring and PSR-17 detection: [`AppFactoryTest::testCreateAppWithAllImplementations`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php#L64), [`testDetermineResponseFactoryReturnsDecoratedFactory`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php#L87), [`testCreateAppWithContainerUsesContainerDependenciesWhenPresent`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php#L289).
- App-level runtime semantics: [`AppTest::testRun`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L1675), [`testRunWithoutPassingInServerRequest`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L1728), [`testHandleReturnsEmptyResponseBodyWithHeadRequestMethod`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L1769).
- Middleware stack behavior: [`MiddlewareDispatcherTest::testExecutesKernelWithEmptyMiddlewareStack`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php#L339), [`testExecutesMiddlewareLastInFirstOut`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php#L356).
- Routing middleware outcomes: [`RoutingMiddlewareTest::testRouteIsStoredOnSuccessfulMatch`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php#L42), [`testRouteIsNotStoredOnMethodNotAllowed`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php#L78), [`testRouteIsNotStoredOnNotFound`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php#L115), [`testPerformRoutingThrowsExceptionOnInvalidRoutingResultsRouteStatus`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php#L151).
- Fallback routing in the tip handler: [`RouteRunnerTest::testRoutingIsPerformedIfRoutingResultsAreUnavailable`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteRunnerTest.php#L26).
- Route execution and invocation strategy: [`RouteTest::testProcessWhenReturningAResponse`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L463), [`testRouteCallableDoesNotAppendEchoedOutput`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L481), [`testRouteCallableAppendsCorrectOutputToResponse`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L505), [`testControllerMethodAsStringResolvesWithContainer`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L415), [`testInvokeUsesRequestHandlerStrategyForRequestHandlers`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L608), [`testRequestHandlerStrategyAppendsRouteArgumentsAsAttributesToRequest`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php#L680).
- Request-context plumbing and URL normalization: [`RouteContextTest::testCanCreateInstanceFromServerRequest`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteContextTest.php#L23), [`testCannotCreateInstanceIfRequestIsMissingAttributes`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteContextTest.php#L81), [`RouteResolverTest::testComputeRoutingResults`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteResolverTest.php#L36).

I only read code and tests for the tour, so I didn’t run the suite. The project memories are written; you can run `serena memories check` from the repo root if you want to sanity-check them.

If you want, I can next trace one specific behavior path in more depth, such as route registration, error handling, or deferred middleware resolution.
